## Page Metadata
Page number: 329
Original page numbers: 514, 106

## Layout And Reading Order
The page contains a single column of text, formatted as a list of diplomatic representatives from various countries. Each entry begins with a title (e.g., "Zijne Majesteit de Koning van Spanje:") followed by one or more indented lines detailing the representative's name and title. The text flows from top to bottom.

## Literal Transcription
